items.title: Solana captures 64% of tokenized stock wallets – What it means now
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's dominance in tokenized stock wallets indicates strong user adoption and could enhance its liquidity and ecosystem growth.

items.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF outflows expose rotation into HYPE, XRP and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Outflows from Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs suggest a shift in investor interest toward Solana, potentially increasing its market visibility and usage.

items.title: Researchers flag TrapDoor malware campaign targeting crypto developer environments including Aptos, Sui and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The identification of malware targeting Solana's developer environment raises security concerns, which could impact developer confidence and ecosystem stability.
